rulings.Case Title: IN RE: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2017 line 1. PETITIONER DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien GRANTED. Moving party met the requirements of CC 8490 et seq. No opposition filed. =(501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN P ELLIOTT VS. ZACHARY SHAFFER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs SHANG CHIANG and HELEN FANG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained. Demurer is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action for retaliation and unlawful actions by landlord; non-opposition filed. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for breach of contract, breach of covenant of quiet enjoyment and wrongful eviction for Plaintiff to properly allege a contract between Plaintiff and moving Defendants. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN P ELLIOTT VS. ZACHARY SHAFFER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs SHANG CHIANG and HELEN FANG's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend; non-opposition filed. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: LI FU YAO ET AL VS. PETER SO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing And Proof Of Service Thereon Of Defendants Motion To Set Aside Defaults Per Ccp 473b
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs PETER SO, MAGGIE SO, and JOSEPHINE SO's Motion To Set Aside Defaults Per Ccp 473b GRANTED. Defendants to file answers forthwith. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: 270 TURK, LLC VS. MARIO HOLLOWAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF 270 TURK, LLC's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. Counsel to prepare order. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: YIWU JIANG VS. INEZ ESTRADA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANTs INEZ ESTRADA and ROSARIO HERNANDEZ's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ADRIAN N. BRODY VS. JAMES BETBEZE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT JAMES BETBEZE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Hearing Required. Defendant to be present. No later than 9:00 a.m. Defendant to file a declaration attaching Proof of Service for the Answer Defendant allegedly attempted to file on October 23, 2017. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: BRENT MARSH VS. ELLEN JAMES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT ELLEN JAMES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Second cause of action is sufficiently alleged and is not uncertain. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS VS. THOMAS RAGSDALE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Support Of Pltf'S Judgmnt On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2017 line 8. PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS' Motion For Support Of Pltf'S Judgmnt On The Pleadings DENIED. The pleadings on file are Plaintiff's complaint and Defendant's demurrer. Plaintiff failed to provide sufficient notice of this motion. Nothing on the face of the pleadings in this action indicates that pre-judgment claimant has no standing to defend this action. = (501/LOT)
